command: mkdir -p /tmp/swamp-google-meet-hardware && cd /tmp/swamp-google-meet-hardware && git init && git remote add origin https://github.com/dougschaefer6/swamp-google-meet-hardware.git

# Copy extension files
cp /home/dougschaefer/swamp-projects/asei-infra/extensions/models/google_meet_hardware/_client.ts /tmp/swamp-google-meet-hardware/
cp /home/dougschaefer/swamp-projects/asei-infra/extensions/models/google_meet_hardware/device.ts /tmp/swamp-google-meet-hardware/
cp /home/dougschaefer/swamp-projects/asei-infra/extensions/models/google_meet_hardware/manifest.yaml /tmp/swamp-google-meet-hardware/
